Upcoming Events

We strive to keep our information as up-to-date as possible. However, we are all volunteers and our capacity is limited.

Event April

Workshop & Structured Play Event
“Consent & Pleasure/Spicy Version” by Birds Without Gender
Sign-up required via form

Date: Saturday 18 April 2026

Start: 4:30 p.m.

Duration: 6 hours

About the Facilitator

Birds Without Gender (they/them) is a writer, performance artist , and energy healer. Their work focuses on the complexities of the human condition and the nuances of truth-telling and desire. They are interested in pleasure as a practice of awareness, connection, and transformation…or the other way around ;)
They have three decades of experience in giving experiential workshops related to personal growth, well being, shadow work, parts work, relationship dynamics, self-love, and creative expression.
They are trans, agender, demiromantic, greysexual, and non-monogamous.
They chant daily for world peace.

About the workshop

For the first part there will be an introduction on consent tools and pleasure tools followed by practical exercises (inspired by Betty Martin’s “The Wheel of Consent”) This part of the workshop is clothes-on and non-sexual.

For the second part we will build up on the information and practice of the first part, only we will spice up the vibe a bit and allow for things to get sexual and/or kinky. There will be NO free-flow play as part of the workshop.

What this workshop / play event is about

  • Undoing normative and performative scripts of intimacy
  • Talking about consent tools
  • Talking about pleasure tools/ pleasure capacity
  • Recognizing and communicating boundaries
  • Practicing becoming aware of our desires
  • Practicing asking for what we want
  • Practicing getting what we want

More information

There is no obligation to get sexual or naked and everyone is allowed and celebrated to participate as much or as little as they want. Observing or chilling out is also a very valid form of participation.

Bring along your favourite objects or anything you might need for the day whether for coziness and comfort (blankets, pillows, etc) or for pleasure and play (lube, toys, etc). You are responsible for knowing how to safely use your own toys.

Bring along any extra food and drinks for your dietary needs (tea and chocolate and fruit will be provided)

Please be on time, once the workshop has started it's no longer possible to participate. Doors will open at 16:30, the workshop will start at 17:00.

Wear whatever you want!

Sign-up

Please fill in the Big Fat Pervy sign-up form - April if you would like to participate in this event

Entrance fee

PlayHouse is a DIY event, this is why the entrance fee is donation based. In the Big Fat Pervy Donation Guidelines your will find a framework to decide what your contribution/donation is as a participant.
